___________________________many toys?

Yes, (They had a lot of toys.)

___________________________the Browns?

Yes, (I'm going to invite the Browns.)

___________________________the coin there?

Yes, (They found the coin there.)

___________________________a coin there?

Yes, (There was a coin there.)

___________________________an hour to get to the place?

Yes, (It took him an hour to get to the place.)
